main_menu.title: ⚔ IRONFALL ⚔
main_menu.subtitle: Iron fell. Runes rose.
main_menu.store_wishlist_message:
Ironfall is in active development.
If you open the Steam store page and add the game to your Wishlist and Follow list, you’ll be giving us a huge boost.
Thank you.

-Ironfall_Dev
main_menu.world_info_body:
Humanity once commanded astonishing machines: energy arms, rune-laced shields, and motor harnesses.

The Collapse came with a waking darkness — ruin rode on corrupted rune-craft. Cities fell; feudal scrap now wraps ancient power.

Survivors still heft relics and rites from the old age, grinding toward the Devil King's throne — one desperate run at a time.

intro_splash.press_to_start: Press any key or click to continue

game_mode.title: HOW DO YOU WANT TO PLAY?
game_mode.online:
🌐 ONLINE CO-OP

P2P Steam
Coming soon...

map_select.title: MODE & MAP
map_select.vs_mode:
🗺 STORY MODE

Open map
Survive 30 minutes!
map_select.mode_arena: ⬡ Arena — ~10 min goal, survive to count as a win
map_select.curse_intro: Run curse is only for this run. Tier 1 is the design baseline (default). Tier 0 is gentler; higher tiers tighten spawns, buff enemy HP and move speed, and shift XP from kills. After the first minute, wave enemies also get a separate global HP/damage/speed buff (not the time-based scaling).
map_select.curse_meta_note: Permanent Meta “Curse” adds extra pressure (spawn + minimum on-screen enemies). The numbers on the bars are from this slider only.
map_select.curse_stat_spawn_desc: Spawn interval is divided by this value, relative to tier 1: tier 1 = 100% index; each step away changes by 10% (tier 0 slightly calmer, tier 5 busier). Higher = shorter gaps between spawns.
map_select.curse_stat_hp_desc: ±10% HP per step vs tier 1 (after time-based scaling). Applies to regular enemies, mini-bosses, and Reaper. Wave enemies also get a separate post–first-minute global HP buff.
map_select.curse_stat_speed_desc: ±5% move speed per step vs tier 1 (BASE_SPEED; swarm rows use their speed override for curse + global buffs).
map_select.curse_stat_xp_desc: ±12% per step vs tier 1 on the XP multiplier slice (1 + Meta Curse + this). Bar shows the run-curse-only curve anchored at tier 1.
map_select.desc_story: Classic Ironfall pacing. Reach the time limit to face the Reaper. Good luck!
map_select.desc_fast: Compressed waves and bosses. Reaper arrives sooner — ideal for 10–15 minute sessions.
map_select.desc_arena: Same map with a shorter time goal (~10 min). After the timer, your run counts as won on the death screen; winning once as Shadow Walker unlocks the Dusk Striker purchase path.
map_select.arena_locked_hint: Pick Arena in the mode column; the map list matches Story (Fallen Kingdom).

shop.title: SHOP
shop.placeholder: Coming soon — cosmetics, pets, and trailer unlocks will be filled in here.

settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.combat_music_duck: Combat music dip (brief lower on weapon attack)
settings.controls_hint: Click a binding, then press a key. Gamepad axes/buttons from the project stay active. Esc cancels.
settings.gamepad_hint: Xbox / PlayStation and other controllers: movement uses the same actions as arrow keys (look in Project → Input Map). Player 1 can use either WASD or the left stick.

character_select.stats_select_hint: Select a hero to preview green bonuses.

unlock.death_knight: Kill 1000 enemies in a single run
unlock.dusk: Win an Arena run as Shadow Walker before the goal time

special.all_weapons_1hp: ☠ Play at 1 HP, all weapons active

upgrade_ui.tooltip_reroll_pool: Rerolls you start this run with. Each reroll spends from this pool for the whole run (not per level-up).
upgrade_ui.tooltip_skip_gold: Skips you start this run with. Skip closes this screen without picking a card and grants +25 gold. Each skip spends from this pool for the whole run.
upgrade_ui.slot_weapon_empty: Empty weapon slot — pick a weapon card to fill it.
upgrade_ui.slot_item_empty: Empty item slot — pick an item card to fill it.

holy_bullet.name: Holy Bullet
holy_bullet.desc:
Bullet + Armor → Holy Bullet
+50% Might, breaks enemy armor

toxic_chain.name: Toxic Chain
toxic_chain.desc:
Chain + Poison → Toxic Chain
Spreads poison when the chain jumps

death_laser.name: Death Laser
death_laser.desc:
Laser + Crit (both MAX) → Death Laser
Every hit is critical (×1.5 Might); longer beam than base Laser.

blood_boomerang.name: Blood Axe
blood_boomerang.desc:
Axe + Lifesteal → Blood Axe
Steals HP on hit

storm.name: Storm
storm.desc:
Lightning + Speed Charm → Storm
Extra lightning on kills

shadow_storm.name: Shadow Storm
shadow_storm.desc:
Shadow + Lightning + Speed → Shadow Storm
Shadow hits trigger lightning chains

frost_nova.name: Frost Nova
frost_nova.desc:
Ice Ball + Armor + Shield (all MAX) → Frost Nova
Area slow/freeze on pulse; reflects part of incoming damage to the attacker.

ember_fan.name: Ember Fan
ember_fan.desc:
Fan Blade (MAX) + Ember Heart (MAX) → Ember Fan
Wider fan, piercing ember blades

binding_circle.name: Binding Circle
binding_circle.desc:
Hex Sigil (MAX) + Glyph Charm (MAX) → Binding Circle
Wide Area seal: heavy slow and Might ticks.

void_lens.name: Void Lens
void_lens.desc:
Gravity Anchor (MAX) + Resonance Stone (MAX) → Void Lens
Stronger pull-in and area damage.

citadel_flail.name: Citadel Flail
citadel_flail.desc:
Bastion Flail (MAX) + Rampart Plate (MAX) → Citadel Flail
Larger sweep, brutal knockback.

fortress_ram.name: Fortress Ram
fortress_ram.desc:
Shield Ram (MAX) + Iron Bulwark (MAX) → Fortress Ram
Wider cone, wall-breaker pressure.

veil_daggers.name: Veil Daggers
veil_daggers.desc:
Twin Daggers (MAX) + Night Vial (MAX) → Veil Daggers
More blades, pierce hits, slightly longer reach.

arc_surge.name: Arc Surge
arc_surge.desc:
Arc Ring (MAX) + Field Lens (MAX) → Arc Surge
Wider donut, faster ticks, higher Might.

collection_menu.title: 📖 Ironfall Codex
collection_menu.pick_desc: Use the tabs: foes, bosses, weapons, items, heroes, maps, glossary. Locked cards hint at how to reveal them.
collection_menu.locked_desc_enemy: Defeat this enemy type once in any run.
collection_menu.locked_desc_boss: Defeat this boss once in any run.
collection_menu.locked_desc_weapon: Obtain this weapon in a run (level-up, chest, or starting loadout).
collection_menu.locked_desc_item: Obtain this item in a run.
collection_menu.locked_desc_character: Unlock this hero through progression (or secret conditions).
collection_menu.locked_desc_map: Start a run on this map to add it to your codex.
collection_menu.locked_desc_world_item: World/Spawn entries are always available for reference.
collection_menu.world_info_hint: Lore sketch: a high-tech age shattered by the Collapse — runes and relics rule the rubble. The full primer sits on the main menu under World — the Collapse.

area.title: Area
area.body: Area scales the size of weapon radii, cones, beams, and similar hit zones. It stacks with meta upgrades and some hero passives. Larger area hits more enemies at once but does not always increase single-target damage.

cooldown.title: Cooldown
cooldown.body: Cooldown is the time between activations of a weapon or item effect. Lower cooldown means faster attacks. Meta upgrades, some items, and hero passives can reduce cooldown; weapons also enforce a small minimum interval so burst never becomes instant.

might.title: Might (damage)
might.body: Might is your overall outgoing damage pressure: flat weapon damage, category bonuses, momentum, adrenaline, crit multiplier on critical hits, and similar effects. The level-up stats panel labels the main line as Damage; it is the number fed into each hit before enemy armor.

growth.title: Growth (gold multiplier)
growth.body: Growth here means the meta upgrade line that increases gold earned from enemies (shown as Gold Multiplier in the meta shop). It is separate from XP bonuses and from pickup magnet range.

duration.title: Duration
duration.body: Duration multiplies how long lasting effects run—slows, poison ticks, shrines, and similar timers. It does not change raw weapon hit damage unless the skill explicitly scales with effect length.

luck.title: Luck
luck.body: Luck nudges the odds of seeing rarer upgrade cards and slightly better rolls during level-ups. It is approximate and run-scoped; it does not guarantee a specific weapon.

magnet.title: Magnet
magnet.body: Magnet increases how far you pull in XP orbs, gold, and pickups. Meta magnet stacks with item-based pickup bonuses where applicable.

crit_chance.title: Crit chance
crit_chance.body: Crit chance is the probability that a hit rolls as a critical strike. Critical hits use your crit damage multiplier (meta and items can raise it). Some evolved weapons treat every hit as a critical strike.

armor.title: Armor (flat reduction)
armor.body: Armor cuts incoming damage by a flat amount after hit calculation. Sources stack (base armor, Armor item, Glyph Charm ward, Rampart Plate, Iron Bulwark).

crit_damage.title: Crit damage multiplier
crit_damage.body: When a hit crits, final Might is multiplied by crit damage. Base is 2.0x; meta and Crit item can raise it further.

pickup_radius.title: Pickup radius
pickup_radius.body: Pickup radius controls how far XP/gold/world pickups start moving toward you. Magnet, Resonance Stone, and Night Vial increase it.

pierce.title: Pierce
pierce.body: Pierce lets a projectile continue through targets instead of disappearing on first hit. Evolutions like Veil Daggers gain extra pierce stacks.

max_hp.title: Max HP
max_hp.body: Max HP is your health ceiling. Higher Max HP gives you more room for mistakes and increases the value of healing effects.

move_speed.title: Move speed
move_speed.body: Move speed controls repositioning, kiting, and pickup routes. It affects survivability as much as damage in dense waves.

lifesteal.title: Lifesteal
lifesteal.body: Lifesteal converts a percentage of dealt damage into healing. It scales with your outgoing damage and hit frequency.

overheal.title: Overheal shield
overheal.body: When you heal at full HP, extra healing can become shield value (if overheal sources are active). This adds a temporary safety buffer above normal HP.

bounce.title: Bounce
bounce.body: Bounce means a hit or projectile can jump/ricochet to extra targets. It improves wave clear when enemies are grouped.

shrine.title: Shrine power
shrine.body: Shrine-related effects track temporary world buffs/debuffs from shrine interactions. Exact impact depends on the shrine type and current run state.

projectile_count.title: Projectile count (multi-shot)
projectile_count.body: Projectile count is how many shots/blades/orbs a weapon emits per attack cycle. More projectiles usually means wider coverage and faster clear.

xp_gain.title: XP gain
xp_gain.body: XP gain increases how quickly you level during a run. It affects level-up timing and access to upgrades/evolutions.

gold_gain.title: Gold gain
gold_gain.body: Gold gain covers both flat and multiplier sources that increase run gold income from kills and pickups.

regen.title: Regeneration
regen.body: Regeneration restores HP over time without hitting enemies. It helps stabilize between pressure spikes.

revival.title: Revival
revival.body: Revival grants an extra life in a run. When lethal damage is taken, you return with partial HP if a revive charge is available.

weapon_slots.title: Weapon slots
weapon_slots.body: Weapon slots define how many distinct weapons you can carry at once. More slots allow broader synergies and easier evolution paths.

item_slots.title: Item slots
item_slots.body: Item slots define how many passive items you can carry at once. More slots increase build flexibility and stat layering.

curse.title: Curse (difficulty pressure)
curse.body: Curse raises enemy pressure (spawn pace and/or enemy power depending on system layer) while improving some rewards. Higher curse means riskier but faster-paced runs.

enemy.name: Grunt
enemy.desc: The fallen kingdom’s foot soldiers. Slow but relentless; they teach you the rhythm of the horde.

fast_enemy.name: Striker
fast_enemy.desc: Yellow streaks that close distance fast. Priority targets when space is tight.

tank_enemy.name: Bulwark
tank_enemy.desc: Heavy purple brutes with huge HP. Encircle events love them—break the ring before they collapse on you.

dasher.name: Dasher
dasher.desc: Pink hunters that surge in straight lines. Sidestep, then punish.

healer.name: Mender
healer.desc: Green support that keeps allies in the fight. Delete them before the wave stabilizes.

exploder.name: Volatile
exploder.desc: Orange carriers that detonate on death. Give them room or pay in HP.

shield_enemy.name: Aegis
shield_enemy.desc: Royal-blue shells that shrug damage until you crack the guard or outplay immunity tags.

giant.name: Colossus
giant.desc: Late-game titans. Wide hitbox, brutal presence—kiting is survival.

ranged_enemy.name: Skirmisher
ranged_enemy.desc: Orange archers that pressure from afar. Close the gap or let your area weapons do the work.

mini_boss.name: Herald
mini_boss.desc: Timeline bosses that announce danger with music and a chest. First kill feels like a milestone.

reaper.name: Reaper
reaper.desc: The deep-crimson endgame sweepers. Each wave grows hungrier—finish the run or be finished.

bullet.name: Bullet
bullet.desc: Straightforward ranged shots. Your bread-and-butter pressure tool.

dagger.name: Twin Daggers
dagger.desc: Thin thrown blades to the nearest foes in order. Starts with two projectiles; lower damage per wave than Bullet, slightly faster cadence.

veil_daggers.name: Veil Daggers
veil_daggers.desc: Evolved form: more targets per volley, piercing hits, longer reach; completes the Night Vial pairing.

aura.name: Aura
aura.desc: Damage zone that follows you. Own the space around your character.

chain.name: Chain
chain.desc: Bouncing lightning chain between targets. Great for clumped waves.

boomerang.name: Axe
boomerang.desc: Thrown axe that sweeps out and returns. Punishes packs that chase you.

lightning.name: Lightning
lightning.desc: Calls down strikes on nearby foes. Strong single-target burst.

ice_ball.name: Ice Ball
ice_ball.desc: Slowing projectile. Control elites and chargers before they reach you.

shadow.name: Shadow
shadow.desc: Orbiting shadow orbs. Consistent close-range damage.

laser.name: Laser
laser.desc: Piercing beam in a line. Melts lines of enemies if you aim well.

fan_blade.name: Fan Blade
fan_blade.desc: Wide melee fan of blades. Shreds anything in your face.

hex_sigil.name: Hex Sigil
hex_sigil.desc: Ground sigils that curse and zone enemies.

gravity_anchor.name: Gravity Anchor
gravity_anchor.desc: Pulls enemies into a damaging gravity well.

bastion_flail.name: Bastion Flail
bastion_flail.desc: Spinning flail with knockback—hold the frontline.

shield_ram.name: Shield Ram
shield_ram.desc: Cone shield charge—burst damage in a line.

holy_bullet.name: Holy Bullet
holy_bullet.desc: Evolved bullet: bonus damage and armor break.

toxic_chain.name: Toxic Chain
toxic_chain.desc: Evolved chain: spreads poison as it jumps between targets.

death_laser.name: Death Laser
death_laser.desc: Evolved laser: crits on every tick with extreme reach.

blood_boomerang.name: Blood Axe
blood_boomerang.desc: Evolved axe: steals life on each hit.

storm.name: Storm
storm.desc: Evolved lightning: bonus bolts when you score kills.

shadow_storm.name: Shadow Storm
shadow_storm.desc: Evolved hybrid: shadow hits can chain lightning.

frost_nova.name: Frost Nova
frost_nova.desc: Evolved ice: area freeze on impact plus reflect tricks.

ember_fan.name: Ember Fan
ember_fan.desc: Evolved fan: wider arc and piercing ember shards.

arc_pulse.name: Arc Ring
arc_pulse.desc: Donut-shaped arc pulse: damages enemies between an inner safe radius and an outer ring. Scales with Area.

arc_surge.name: Arc Surge
arc_surge.desc: Evolved arc ring: wider band, faster ticks, higher Might—Field Lens resonance at full power.

lifesteal.name: Lifesteal
lifesteal.desc: Heal when you deal damage. Stabilizes long fights.

armor.name: Armor
armor.desc: Flat damage reduction. Stack levels to shrug chip damage.

crit.name: Crit
crit.desc: Critical strike chance and damage scaling.

explosion.name: Explosion
explosion.desc: On-kill splash damage. Snowballs in dense hordes.

magnet.name: Magnet
magnet.desc: Pulls XP and gold farther. Less running, more killing.

night_vial.name: Night Vial
night_vial.desc: Small pickup radius bonus for XP and gold. Mild comfort on its own; pairs with Twin Daggers for the Veil Daggers evolution.

poison.name: Poison
poison.desc: DoT that ticks enemies down. Synergizes with chain evolutions.

shield.name: Shield
shield.desc: Blocks hits on a cooldown. Forgives small mistakes.

speed_charm.name: Speed Charm
speed_charm.desc: Move faster. Unlocks Storm-style evolutions at max.

blood_pool.name: Blood Pool
blood_pool.desc: Leaves hazardous pools. Zone control for kiting.

luck_stone.name: Luck Stone
luck_stone.desc: Better odds on rare rolls and a little extra gold.

turbine.name: Turbine
turbine.desc: Utility engine item—synergy with cooldown and area builds.

steam_armor.name: Steam Armor
steam_armor.desc: Defense with a steam-themed mitigation twist.

energy_cell.name: Energy Cell
energy_cell.desc: Powers sustained fire and cooldown recovery.

ember_heart.name: Ember Heart
ember_heart.desc: Fireheart passive that pairs with fan evolutions.

glyph_charm.name: Glyph Charm
glyph_charm.desc: Ward and glyph synergy—pairs with sigil evolutions.

resonance_stone.name: Resonance Stone
resonance_stone.desc: Pickup and pull radius—pairs with gravity evolutions.

rampart_plate.name: Rampart Plate
rampart_plate.desc: Heavy armor plate—pairs with flail evolutions.

iron_bulwark.name: Iron Bulwark
iron_bulwark.desc: Iron defense passive—pairs with shield ram evolutions.

field_lens.name: Field Lens
field_lens.desc: Focus lens that widens your Area multiplier. Pairs with Arc Ring for the Arc Surge evolution.

warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.desc: Balanced fighter: +5 flat damage and +8 origin (combat habit). Good starter.
warrior.role: Close-range sustained fighting—flat damage and durability lean.

mage.name: Mage
mage.desc: Aura starter with extra max HP. Area-control mindset.
mage.role: AoE damage and aura start—mage positioning fantasy.

vampire.name: Vampire
vampire.desc:
Blood-hungry hunter.
Weapon: chain (Chain — jumping hits)
Item: lifesteal (found in-run; pairs with Toxic Chain)
Evolution: toxic_chain (Toxic Chain)
Unlock: survive 2 min as Warrior → 175 gold; origin: +10% lifesteal
vampire.role: Close-range chain bruiser with lifesteal—fighter tempo.

hunter.name: Hunter
hunter.desc: Axe thrower with extra lifesteal synergy.

frost.name: Frost
frost.desc: Slow specialist—double slow duration, ice ball starter.

dusk.name: Dusk Striker
dusk.desc:
Twin-dagger skirmisher; Shadow Walker–paced mobility.

Weapon: dagger (Twin Daggers — thin throws to nearest foes in order; starts with two, lower base damage per volley than a single Bullet shot, slightly shorter cooldown)
Night Vial (night_vial): found during a run (level-up, chest, etc.); at Twin Daggers MAX + Night Vial MAX, evolve into Veil Daggers.
Evolution: veil_daggers (Veil Daggers — more blades, pierce, longer reach)
Unlock: Win an Arena run (reach the time goal) with Shadow Walker on your roster → unlock → 380 gold; origin: +22% speed, −18% max HP
dusk.role: Twin Daggers start; Night Vial on the run; Veil Daggers evolution; Arena + Shadow Walker unlock cadence—fighter skirmisher.

engineer.name: Engineer
engineer.desc: Laser main with area bonuses—glass cannon leaning.
engineer.role: Laser and area control—skill-shot mage fantasy.

paladin.name: Paladin
paladin.desc: Tanky holy starter with armor and Holy Bullet.

blood_prince.name: Blood Prince
blood_prince.desc: XP-hungry noble with Blood Axe fantasy.

nomad.name: Nomad
nomad.desc:
Exile skirmisher.
Weapon: fan_blade (Fan Blade — wide close fan)
Item: ember_heart (Ember Heart — fireheart passive; Ember Fan evolution)
Evolution: ember_fan (Ember Fan)
Unlock: 175 total kills → 350 gold; origin: +5 flat damage
nomad.role: Fan Blade start; Ember Heart on the run; Ember Fan evolution—mobile fighter.

sigil_warden.name: Sigil Warden
sigil_warden.desc:
Seal and bind specialist.
Weapon: hex_sigil (Hex Sigil)
Item: glyph_charm (Glyph Charm)
Evolution: binding_circle (Binding Circle)
Unlock: 220 kills → 400 gold; origin: +12% area, -8% speed
sigil_warden.role: Sigil zones, slows, and binding evolution—controller.

grav_binder.name: Grav Binder
grav_binder.desc:
Gravity well expert.
Weapon: gravity_anchor (Gravity Anchor)
Item: resonance_stone (Resonance Stone)
Evolution: void_lens (Void Lens)
Unlock: survive 6m30s → 430 gold; origin: -12% cooldown, -10% max HP
grav_binder.role: Pull fields and crowd squeeze plus resonance—controller.

ironclad.name: Ironclad
ironclad.desc:
Frontline bulwark.
Weapon: bastion_flail (Bastion Flail)
Item: rampart_plate (Rampart Plate)
Evolution: citadel_flail (Citadel Flail)
Unlock: kill 1 tank enemy → 480 gold; origin: +3 armor, -10% speed
ironclad.role: Bastion flail plus rampart plates—knockback frontline tank.

linebreaker.name: Linebreaker
linebreaker.desc:
Shield-charge linebreaker.
Weapon: shield_ram (Shield Ram — cone slam)
Item: iron_bulwark (Iron Bulwark — armor)
Evolution: fortress_ram (Fortress Ram)
Unlock: survive 450s → 520 gold; origin: +12% max HP, -6% damage
linebreaker.role: Shield ram cone and iron bulwark—line-breaking tank.

arcanist.name: Arcanist
arcanist.desc:
Donut arc mage—unique spacing fantasy.
Weapon: arc_pulse (Arc Ring — damage in an annulus; scales with Area)
Item: field_lens (Field Lens — found in-run; adds Area%; pairs with Arc Surge evolution)
Evolution: arc_surge (Arc Surge)
Unlock: 195 total kills → 385 gold; origin: +18% XP, −12% max HP
arcanist.role: Arc Ring start; Field Lens on the run; Arc Surge evolution—XP-leaning mage with ring control.

death_knight.name: Death Knight
death_knight.desc: Secret: Death Laser start, huge damage, brutal tradeoffs.
death_knight.role: High risk / high reward burst—fighter with special rules.

chaos.name: Chaos
chaos.desc: Secret: random weapon starts—pure variance runs.
chaos.role: Random weapon start—special roster fantasy outside the four classes.

omega.name: Omega
omega.desc: Secret: all weapons, 1 HP. For experts and showboaters.
omega.role: Full loadout at 1 HP—special challenge pick.

vs_map.name: Fallen Kingdom
vs_map.desc: Story map—open field, 30-minute survival arc, bosses on the clock.

map2.name: Map II
map2.desc: Reserved slot. Coming in a future update.

map3.name: Map III
map3.desc: Reserved slot. Coming in a future update.

xp_orb.name: XP Orbs (1x / 3x / 8x)
xp_orb.desc: Primary run progression currency. Orb tier controls XP burst size; co-op shares part of gains.

gold_orb.name: Gold Orb
gold_orb.desc: Collect for run gold. Amount scales with enemy type, luck/growth layers, and event outcomes.

chest.name: Chest
chest.desc: On open: random item, gold reward, or heal chunk depending on roll table.

blood_oath.name: Blood Oath
blood_oath.desc: Pickup event. Solo grants gold; in co-op can trigger Blood Oath buff if both players are close.

cog_shard.name: Cog Shard
cog_shard.desc: Special shard tracked by cog systems. Feeds run-specific bonus and economy hooks.

time_gear.name: Time Gear
time_gear.desc: Pickup that freezes/slows all enemies for a short global control window.

steam_bomb.name: Steam Bomb
steam_bomb.desc: Pickup that wipes normal enemies on screen (bosses excluded).

vacuum_collector.name: Vacuum Collector
vacuum_collector.desc: Triggers global attract on XP and gold orbs for quick cleanup after heavy fights.

freeze_barrel.name: Freeze Barrel
freeze_barrel.desc: Breakable world object; when triggered, emits a large slow/freeze pulse.

poison_trap.name: Poison Trap
poison_trap.desc: Triggered trap that leaves poison area pressure over time.

shrine_risk.name: Shrine of Risk
shrine_risk.desc: Tradeoff shrine: higher rewards in exchange for temporary enemy pressure.

shrine_devil.name: Devil Shrine
shrine_devil.desc: High-risk shrine that spends HP for powerful upgrade outcomes.

destructible_crate.name: Destructible Crate
destructible_crate.desc: Breakable world crate with random utility/combat bonus drops.

ruin_cache.name: Ruin Cache
ruin_cache.desc: World cache that grants upgrade progress or fallback gold if no valid upgrade is found.

damage_number.name: Floating Damage Number
damage_number.desc: Visual combat feedback text for damage/heal/crit events.

projectiles_system.name: Projectile Systems
projectiles_system.desc: Shared projectile layer for player/enemy shots with pooling, hit logic, and impact feedback.

passive_world_effects.name: Passive World Effects
passive_world_effects.desc: Item-driven world VFX such as blood pools, charm trails, and temporary field effects.

cooldown_bonus.name: ⚡ Cooldown Reduction
cooldown_bonus.desc:
Fire rate +8% per rank
(max rank: -40% cooldown)

area_bonus.name: 💥 Area Size
area_bonus.desc:
Attack area +10% per rank
(max rank: +50% area)

multi_attack_bonus.name: 🎯 Multi Strike
multi_attack_bonus.desc:
All weapons +1 extra attack
(max rank: +3 attacks)

adrenaline.name: 🔥 Adrenaline
adrenaline.desc:
+20 damage per missing HP
(stronger when low)

max_hp_bonus.name: 💗 Max HP
max_hp_bonus.desc:
Starting HP +25 per rank
(max rank: +125 HP)

armor_bonus.name: 🛡 Starting Armor
armor_bonus.desc:
Starting armor +2 per rank
(max rank: -10 damage taken)

revival.name: ✨ Revival
revival.desc:
Once per run: revive at 30% HP
(max rank: 1 charge)

overheal.name: 🔰 Overheal Shield
overheal.desc:
Healing while full HP
grants a shield

xp_bonus.name: ⭐ XP Bonus
xp_bonus.desc:
XP gain +10% per rank
(max rank: +50% XP)

gold_bonus.name: 💰 Gold Bonus
gold_bonus.desc:
+1 gold per enemy per rank
(max rank: +5 gold)

growth_bonus.name: 📦 Gold Multiplier
growth_bonus.desc:
Gold earned +15% per rank
(max rank: +75% gold)

start_level_bonus.name: 📈 Starting Level
start_level_bonus.desc:
With at least 1 rank: begin the run at level 2 (+1 net).
Ranks 2–3 are the same for now (extra reward planned later).

reroll_bonus.name: 🔄 Extra Reroll
reroll_bonus.desc:
+1 reroll added to your starting pool each run
(max rank: +3 rerolls total from this line)

skip_bonus.name: ⏭ Extra Skip
skip_bonus.desc:
+1 skip added to your starting pool each run
(max rank: +3 skips total from this line)

weapon_slot_bonus.name: 🔢 Weapon Slot
weapon_slot_bonus.desc:
+1 max weapon slot per rank (max 2 ranks).
Base 6 + up to 2 here = 8 weapon slots.

item_slot_bonus.name: 🧰 Item Slot
item_slot_bonus.desc:
+1 max item slot per rank (max 2 ranks).
Base 6 + up to 2 here = 8 item slots.

speed_bonus.name: 👟 Move Speed
speed_bonus.desc:
Move speed +10 per rank
(max rank: +50 speed)

curse_level.name: 💀 Curse
curse_level.desc:
Enemy power/count +10%
XP 2x per rank in return
